text: Here, in the soft light of this modern, minimalistic room and then amid the vivid, intellectual displays of R+D, I feel a curious duality. The first space, empty and hushed, stirs a quiet anticipation in me—a sense of waiting, as if something significant is about to unfold. In the second space, surrounded by words, images, and colors, my mind sharpens; I feel stimulated, almost electrified by ideas. I am both observer and participant, simultaneously grounded in my body and soaring in contemplation.
